underlying_goal: Refactor the LLM provider and body module settings architecture to adopt an OpenRouter-first approach, consolidate ~40 providers down to ~12, and treat multimodal as a baseline capability rather than an optional add-on
friction_detail: Claude initially ran P0 diagnostics thinking user wanted bug verification, but user actually wanted a full architecture refactor of the provider/module system.
brief_summary: User wanted to plan a major refactor of the LLM provider architecture to an OpenRouter-first multimodal design; Claude produced a detailed plan document but the session was interrupted before implementation began.
